item: I experience deep emotions when I see beautiful things.
I see beauty that other people pass by without noticing.
Beauty in the world is not that important to me.
Some people get emotional about beautiful things, but not me.
I am a brave person.
I have taken frequent stands in the face of strong opposition.
I'm not a particularly brave person.
If others disagree with me, I tend to back down.
I am always coming up with new ways to do things.
I am an original thinker.
I am not someone who comes up with new and different ideas.
I am very bad at coming up with original solutions to problems.
I have many interests.
I am always curious about the world.
Very few things interest me.
I rarely explore new things.
Even if I do not like someone, I treat him or her fairly.
I treat all people equally regardless of who they might be.
I treat people unfairly if I do not like them.
I treat some people much better than others.
I rarely hold a grudge.
I am always willing to give someone a chance to make amends.
There are things I've resented for a long time.
I don't forget past wrongs.
I am an extremely grateful person.
I feel a profound sense of appreciation every day.
I often take things for granted.
I do not think I have much to be grateful for.
I always keep my promises.
My promises can be trusted.
I often break my promises.
I will say things I know are untrue if it's easier.
I know that I will succeed with the goals I set for myself.
Despite challenges, I always remain hopeful about the future.
People would call me a pessimist.
When I think about the future, I feel hopeless.
I have been told that modesty is one of my most notable characteristics.
I am always humble about the good things that have happened to me.
I like to call attention to myself.
I like to let people know about my accomplishments.
I try to add some humor to whatever I do.
I am known for my good sense of humor.
I often allow a bad situation to take away my sense of humor.
It's hard for me to laugh when I'm in a bad mood.
I make decisions only when I have all of the facts.
I try to have good reasons for my important decisions.
I tend to make impulsive decisions.
I like to let emotions guide my actions.
I am never too busy to help a friend.
I always try to help people in need.
I am often too busy to help others.
I do not call friends when they are sick.
One of my strengths is helping a group of people work well together even when they have their differences.
My friends always tell me I am a strong but fair leader.
In a group setting, I rarely take the lead role.
I consider myself a follower.
I can accept love from others.
I can express love to someone else.
It is difficult for me to accept love from others.
It is difficult for me to express my love to others.
I am a true life-long learner.
I love to learn new things.
I don't enjoy learning new things.
I don't really like learning new things.
I never get sidetracked when I work.
I never quit a task before it is done.
I have a hard time finishing what I start.
My plans often fall through because I give up.
Others consider me to be a wise person.
My friends think I am wise.
I am bad at making sense of complicated situations.
My friends would not consider me to be a wise person.
I always make careful choices.
I think through the consequences every time before I act.
I never think before I speak.
I am often careless.
I am a highly disciplined person.
I do not give into temptation.
I often make choices that feel good right away, even if they may be bad for me in the future.
I lack self-discipline.
I am good at sensing what other people are feeling.
I always know what to say to make people feel good.
I often find it difficult to understand new people.
I have a hard time figuring out what people are feeling.
I am a spiritual person.
My beliefs make my life important.
I am not a very spiritual person.
I do not believe there is a universal power or force.
It is important to me to respect decisions made by my group.
I work at my very best when I am a group member.
I really enjoy being a part of a group.
I don't like being a member of groups.
I awaken with a sense of excitement about the day's possibilities.
I am genuinely excited to start each day.
I rarely feel energetic.
I dread getting up in the morning.
